creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Thaddeus,

After a long time finally new news about the update of the port MDBtools.

I just put an update of the port for review on Phabricator [1]. The port is reworked in many ways, e.g. there is now a dependent port databases/libmswstr.

More details about the development of MDBtools are best read on Github.

Please feel free to ask, if you have questions about the patch in the review :)


[1] https://reviews.freebsd.org/D28118
